theme: A chapel-shaped absence folded out of the world, where relics of saints no one remembers hum in glass.

rooms.name: Threshold of Nowhere
rooms.description: You stand on a floor of pale gold that gives slightly, like flesh. There is no ceiling, only a soft amber glow with no source. An arch of fused candle-wax opens north into a nave, and low doorways lead east into a gallery and west into an ossuary.

rooms.name: The Backwards Nave
rooms.description: Pews of black glass face away from the altar, as if the congregation worshipped the door they came in by. A bone bell hangs from nothing at all in the center of the aisle. The threshold lies south, and to the north a wall of woven candle-smoke refuses to be a wall.

rooms.name: The Hollow Reliquary
rooms.description: Relic-cases of breathing glass line a chamber shaped like the inside of a held note. Something in a warden's shape stands guard over a glass psalm that sings very quietly to itself. The nave lies back to the south.

rooms.name: Gallery of Unpainted Portraits
rooms.description: Frames of tarnished silver hang in rows, each holding a canvas that is not blank but not painted either - faces almost form when you stop looking. A clouded pearl rests on a velvet stand as though recently admired. The threshold lies west.

rooms.name: Ossuary of the Unremembered
rooms.description: Bones are stacked here with terrible tenderness, each labeled in a script that rearranges itself. A saint's knucklebone sits apart on a cushion of dust, and something that was once a skeleton keeps its vigil. The threshold lies east.

custom.name: reliquary warden
custom.description: The reliquary warden stands guard: a vestment with no one inside it, sleeves ending in candle flame.

items.name: glass psalm
items.description: A sheet of hymn-music blown from glass; it sings faintly when held.

items.name: clouded pearl
items.description: A pearl the size of an eye, clouded like a cataract that remembers seeing.

items.name: knucklebone
items.description: A saint's knucklebone, worn smooth by prayers nobody finished.

puzzle.item_description: A bell carved from a single hollow bone hangs from nothing at all, its clapper a black pearl.
puzzle.success_message: The bone bell tolls a note you feel in your teeth. The wall of woven candle-smoke to the north unravels, thread by thread, into a passage.
puzzle.hint: The clapper is a black pearl. The smoke-wall to the north trembles at the smallest sound; a true toll might unmake it.
